name: Kanape Me Zampon, 2 (Zampon Canape, 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut zampon to fit the shape of the crackers you are using.
2. With a sharp knife, cut out small hearts from the beet rounds.
3. Cut out small diamonds from the beet rounds.
4. Cut out small clubs from the olives.
5. Cut out small spades from the olives.
6. Decorate the zampon canapes with these shapes to resemble playing cards.
